ordinanceLabel: Lake Forest Municipal Code (eCode360) · 2025 California Building Standards Code (Ord. 382, Nov. 18, 2025)

utility.water: El Toro Water District (ETWD) — most of city; portions served by Moulton Niguel Water District (MNWD)

suggestedQuestions: My property is in a WUI/FHSZ zone — what fire-hardening requirements apply?
